title: ebnerella hutchisoniana
intro: Ebnerella hutchisoniana is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is also known as the Hutchison's angelica or Hutchison's angelica root, and is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and promoting wound healing. Ebnerella hutchisoniana can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried root infusion to harness its medicinal properties.
